text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indignation pulses through me in this<n>moment. Do
you know why?
choice_data_list: Because you didn't get first place again?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No... My heart aches because I was<n>not my
perfect self!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The summit is, naturally, a position<n>meant for the
Overlord.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The Overlord is the star who shines<n>supreme in
every circumstance.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But that was not me this day!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Did my beauty come across on the<n>track? Did I
inspire the masses?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: No! I should have shined brighter.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas, how can my unsatisfactory<n>running ever
ensnare the hearts of<n>the crowd?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas, how can my unsatisfactory<n>running ever
ensnare the hearts of<n>the crowd?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Of course. I am aware of this.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Only a fool would be so hideous to<n>rush for
success.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes... Now is still the time to endure.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Train diligently, build experience, and<n>keep our
sights on the ultimate goal...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Exactly, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Buds exposed to the harshest rains<n>produce
greater flowers when their<n>time to blossom
comes.
I look forward to that moment!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O's eyes are beaming<n>with motivation.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Naturally! I refuse to allow things to<n>end this way!

I swear here and now that with an<n>unforgettable
performance, I will ignite<n>thunderous applause in
the next<n>event!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With that, she puts the palm of her<n>hand to her
lips.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I tire of vowing with kisses that taste<n>of dirt.
Kisses ought to be pleasant<n>and sweet.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Wait for me, o goddess of victory!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: This Overlord shall run so elegantlythat even you will feel impelled tobend the knee!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O and I train with greater<n>vigor the next
day.
